LanguageData.UB_SNS_GameDevBad.title: Game "developer"
LanguageData.UB_SNS_GameDevBad.description: [PAWN_nameDef] worked for a large game development company, riding the coattails of [PAWN_possessive] father, who owned the business. [PAWN_pronoun] would use [PAWN_possessive] position of power to demean those under [PAWN_objective], and constantly take credit for their work.
